title: Petco Health and Wellness Company (WOOF) Q1 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Petco Health and Wellness Company (WOOF) Q1 2022 Earnings Call Transcript. Q1 2022 Results: Petco Health and Wellness Company held its Q1 2022 earnings conference call on May 24, 2022, covering the period ending March 31, 2022. Key Highlights: Q1 adjusted EBITDA was $133 million, an increase of 5% from prior year, with an adjusted EBITDA margin of 9%. SG&A as a percentage of revenue improved from 38.8% in Q1 2021 to 37.8% in Q1 2022. Membership Program: Vital Care subscription totals reached over 220,000 during the quarter. Strategic Performance: The company continued to leverage operational efficiencies and margin expansion initiatives. Management discussions covered the company's response to changing consumer behavior and market conditions. Forward Looking: The company provided guidance for coming quarters amid continuing economic uncertainties.
